productDisplayName: Puma Men Gypsy II Olive Sandals
description: Perfect for those long days of working around the clock, the puma Gypsy II sandals are stylish and comfortable at the same time. With padded straps and a cushioned footbed, there's nothing better you can offer your feet for that breathable feel.UpperVelvety synthetic leather straps with velcro fastening at the forefoot and midfoot for a snug FitBackfoot strap for support and to lock the foot in placePerforations on the sides of straps for enhanced breathabilityCushioned straps for comfortStitch detailing on straps with puma cat logo for styleFootbed textured with hexagonal patterns for a massage feelCurved footbed for ergonomic comfort to the inner archOutsoleTPR outsole with multidirectional lugs all over for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustUse a brush to remove dust from the velvety strapsDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
